title: Phase 4: Activity feed page
description: Implement activity/page.tsx Server Component. Components: EventTypeFilter.tsx (pill tabs), ActivityTable.tsx (filterable table with canvas preview).

title: Phase 2: Browse page components
description: Implement Navbar.tsx, StatsBar.tsx, FilterSidebar.tsx, BitmapCard.tsx, BrowseClient.tsx, RarityBadge, StatusPill, PriceDisplay, CountUp UI components. Also BitmapCanvas.tsx with PRNG and 5 renderers (city, grid, mondrian, punk, palindrome). App page.tsx Browse Server Component.

title: Phase 3: Detail page
description: Implement bitmap/[id]/page.tsx Server Component with 2-col layout. Components: MetadataPanel.tsx, ActionPanel.tsx, PriceHistoryChart.tsx (Recharts), RelatedBitmaps.tsx.

title: Phase 1: Bootstrap Next.js + foundation files
description: Bootstrap Next.js 14 app (manually create package.json + config since create-next-app conflicts with existing files). Install recharts, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, swr. Set up tailwind.config.ts, globals.css, lib/types.ts, lib/mock-data.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/utils.ts, lib/bitmap-type.ts, and app/layout.tsx with Space Grotesk + Inter + JetBrains Mono fonts.

title: Phase 5: Analytics dashboard page
description: Implement analytics/page.tsx Server Component with Promise.all data fetches. Components: StatCard.tsx, FloorChart.tsx, VolumeChart.tsx, HolderDistribution.tsx, RarityDonut.tsx (all Recharts).
